series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of working papers, proposals, invitation to bid (ADM-500), registered mail receipts, and copies of correspondence and monthly updates. Used to develop and track progress of this system.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area 5 years after date of receipt, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office area 5 years after date of receipt, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
